response.global_analysis:
1. Transcription: Transcribed the English conversations between VTuber Ina (Ninomae Ina'nis) and Anya Melfissa as they navigate and trade bees in Minecraft.
2. Contextual Accuracy: Accurately transcribed game-related terms like 'Regen', 'Dolphin's Grace', 'Elytra', and 'combat bees'.
3. Timing: Captured exact spoken intervals and rapid dialogue transitions during their negotiation.

subtitles.original: Okay, where's all the combat bees?
subtitles.english: Okay, where's all the combat bees?

subtitles.original: I haven't gotten a rare... Okay, Regen level 2, there's one.
subtitles.english: I haven't gotten a rare... Okay, Regen level 2, there's one.

subtitles.original: I think... I mean, this one also has Regen 2, it doesn't have any other skills.
subtitles.english: I think... I mean, this one also has Regen 2, it doesn't have any other skills.

subtitles.original: Regen, Speed would be worth a lot.
subtitles.english: Regen, Speed would be worth a lot.

subtitles.original: Oh, this one is missing a bee, hold on, hold on, hold on.
subtitles.english: Oh, this one is missing a bee, hold on, hold on, hold on.

subtitles.original: This hasn't been cooking for so long.
subtitles.english: This hasn't been cooking for so long.

subtitles.original: There's another Regen... Regen 1, Fire Resistance.
subtitles.english: There's another Regen... Regen 1, Fire Resistance.

subtitles.original: I do have... hold on, let's see.
subtitles.english: I do have... hold on, let's see.

subtitles.original: Well, I have, currently, two bees that have Regen 2...
subtitles.english: Well, I have, currently, two bees that have Regen 2...

subtitles.original: ...but one of them also has Speed 1.
subtitles.english: ...but one of them also has Speed 1.

subtitles.original: Ah, Speed 1. What will be the price difference?
subtitles.english: Ah, Speed 1. What will be the price difference?

subtitles.original: I don't know how much bees go for, honestly, but I can sell the super rare...
subtitles.english: I don't know how much bees go for, honestly, but I can sell the super rare...

subtitles.original: How- how- how much- what's your budget?
subtitles.english: How- how- how much- what's your budget?

subtitles.original: I guess as long as it doesn't go over 1 million, so below 1 million would be ideal.
subtitles.english: I guess as long as it doesn't go over 1 million, so below 1 million would be ideal.

subtitles.original: The thing is, I also don't know the price market of the bees.
subtitles.english: The thing is, I also don't know the price market of the bees.

subtitles.original: Actually, let me go look at how much it is in shop real quick with my Elytra. I'll come back.
subtitles.english: Actually, let me go look at how much it is in shop real quick with my Elytra. I'll come back.

subtitles.original: I don't know if there's anyone selling bees, Regen...
subtitles.english: I don't know if there's anyone selling bees, Regen...

subtitles.original: No, like there's like... there's a... there's a base price for the shop, yeah, yeah, yeah.
subtitles.english: No, like there's like... there's a... there's a base price for the shop, yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: My chat is saying 9-9-9-9-9-9-9, but I'll make you a good deal.
subtitles.english: My chat is saying 9-9-9-9-9-9-9, but I'll make you a good deal.

subtitles.original: I'll be right back, I'll be right back.
subtitles.english: I'll be right back, I'll be right back.

subtitles.original: I think the super rare one is like a little less, but I'll check.
subtitles.english: I think the super rare one is like a little less, but I'll check.

subtitles.original: Where's my mouse? There you go.
subtitles.english: Where's my mouse? There you go.

subtitles.original: All right, so, the base price that I can just sell it to the store is 10k.
subtitles.english: All right, so, the base price that I can just sell it to the store is 10k.

subtitles.original: But since it has... since it has options that you desire...
subtitles.english: But since it has... since it has options that you desire...

subtitles.original: ...50k for the one with the Speed...
subtitles.english: ...50k for the one with the Speed...

subtitles.original: ...and then, just 20k for the one with just the Regen 2, how is that?
subtitles.english: ...and then, just 20k for the one with just the Regen 2, how is that?
